headline: ACCESS GPO Announces Preferred Strategic Commercial Agreement to Provide Affera™ Mapping and Ablation System with Sphere-9™ Catheter to Ambulatory Surgery Centers
summary: NEW YORK, March 13, 2026--ACCESS GPO today announced a preferred, multi-year agreement with Medtronic to support availability of the Affera™ Mapping and Ablation System with Sphere-9™ Catheter in ambulatory surgery centers (ASCs) across the United States. The agreement is designed to help physician-led ASCs gain earlier access to next-generation technology for treatment of cardiac arrhythmias in the ASC setting.

headline: Medtronic Leadership Shift Links ENT And Neuroscience For Future Growth Focus
summary: Medtronic (NYSE:MDT) has appointed Sean Haag as president of its ear, nose and throat (ENT) business. Haag has also joined the leadership team of Medtronic's neuroscience group. This leadership change reflects internal moves within a key clinical area for the company. For you as an investor, this update sits at the intersection of Medtronic's medical device portfolio and its broader neuroscience focus. The ENT business involves surgical tools and technologies used by specialists, while the...

headline: Medtronic (MDT) Is Down 6.1% After Q3 Beat And Dividend Hike - Has The Bull Case Changed?
summary: In early March 2026, Medtronic reported stronger-than-expected Q3 2026 results with 6% year-over-year organic revenue growth and affirmed a US$0.71 quarterly dividend per share, extending its 48-year record of annual dividend increases and maintaining its dividend aristocrat status. This combination of solid operating performance and continued dividend growth underscores Medtronic’s emphasis on returning cash to shareholders while supporting ongoing investment in its medical device...
